description:
You are a nursing instructor setting up a peer review assignment. Create and fully configure a Workshop activity in the 'Nursing Ethics and Law' course. 

1. Log in to Moodle (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!).
2. Navigate to the 'Nursing Ethics and Law' course and turn editing on.
3. Add a new 'Workshop' activity.
4. Name it EXACTLY: 'Peer Assessment: End-of-Life Care Scenario'.
5. Open the file at ~/Documents/ethics_workshop_setup.txt. Copy the provided Submission Instructions and Assessment Instructions into the corresponding fields in the workshop settings.
6. Set the Grading strategy to 'Accumulative grading'.
7. Save and display the workshop.
8. Click 'Edit assessment form' and add the 3 specific grading aspects detailed in the text file (Autonomy=30 points, Beneficence/Non-maleficence=40 points, Clarity=30 points). Ensure the maximum grades match exactly.
9. Save the assessment form.
10. Finally, switch the Workshop from the 'Setup phase' to the 'Submission phase' (click the lightbulb icon) so students can begin submitting.

All details needed are in ~/Documents/ethics_workshop_setup.txt.
